name: Dutch Baby with Arugula and Parmesan
servings: serves 4 | prep. time 15 minutes | cooking time 20 minutes
method: Preheat a large oven-safe skillet set in an oven to 400°F (204°C). Melt the butter in the skillet.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the eggs, milk, both flours, salt, and pepper.
Pour the pancake batter into the hot skillet. Bake for 20 minutes in the oven.
Serve immediately topped with the arugula and shaved parmesan.
